title: Chapter 30
content:
Chapter 30

"That was a part of my awakening. I could make healing potions at the expense of my mana." I replied.

"Yo-You can already wield mana?" Lucas asked, wide-eyed as if he were looking at a monster. I was confused by his statement, but chose to divert the topic since it seemed sensitive.

"For now, I can only make health potions. But I feel like I could make something else if my mana were to increase in quantity." I replied, making Rayla and Sandra look at me wide-eyed.

When I visited the alchemist shop the other day, I didn't find potions, but considering Sandra was talking about potions that day when I fucked her in the throat, potions did seem to exist. Just not for poor people like us.

"The-Then are you saying you can make as much as you can as long as you have mana?" Rayla asked.

I nodded and replied, "I can."

There was no need to overcomplicate the matter. One healing potion cost me only 100 shop coins, and I could obtain that much by killing only an E rank monster. They weren't expensive at all, so I could keep up that pretense forever.

Sandra came to terms with it sooner, probably because she was aware of my other... change.

"I have never heard of a thing like that!" Lucas stood on his feet and asked, "We have to report it to the town chief."

"NO!" Rayla yelled as fiery embers appeared around her, instantly scaring Lucas, who dimmed down like a meek cat. Rayla looked at him in so much anger that even I was a little scared, "No one will know about this except us. Not even Julian and Martha. Do you understand?"

At her threatening voice, Lucas nodded meekly and a bit afraid. She then turned to look at Sandra, who also nodded, and then she turned to me, "Jack. Never use this ability of yours without us knowing. Never show it to someone else as well. Keep it a secret at tomorrow's awakening ceremony."

I nodded and replied, "I will keep that in mind, Mother."

"Good." She replied as she sighed in relief, "You must have exhausted yourself by using that ability of yours. Rest for now, you have to attend the ceremony tomorrow as well."

I nodded and stood up, but instead of leaving, I turned to Sandra and asked, "Sandra, can you help me relax a bit?"

She smiled and nodded as she replied, "You go to the bathroom. I will join you soon."

Under the curious gaze of Rayla, I made my way to the bathroom while Lucas picked Julian and took him to his room under Rayla's guidance, who took care of Martha.
